title: The Online Interview
content: Sophia had prepared for weeks for an important online job interview. On the morning of the meeting, she tested her camera, microphone, and internet connection several times. Everything seemed perfect until five minutes before the interview, when her laptop unexpectedly restarted. Fortunately, she remained calm and quickly rejoined the meeting. During the conversation, she answered technical questions, discussed previous projects, and explained her career goals. The interview lasted almost an hour and felt more natural than she expected. A few days later, she received an offer from the company. The experience taught her that preparation and adaptability are equally important during virtual interviews.
